## AI assistance disclosure

This project requires a short disclosure of how the PR was produced. It is **not** a gatekeep — AI-assisted contributions are welcome when the author understands and stands behind the code. The disclosure lets reviewers pick the right review mode (design-level vs. correctness-focused).

Pick one:

- [ ] **No AI assistance** — written by hand.
- [ ] **AI-assisted typing / refactoring** — design and decisions are mine; AI helped generate or modify code I reviewed.
- [ ] **AI-led** — significant parts of the design and implementation were generated by AI; I reviewed and validated the result.

**Model(s) / tools used (if any):**

<!-- e.g. "Claude Opus 4.7 via Claude Code", "GPT-5", "Gemini 2.5 Pro with a project-specific system prompt". Include the guidance or agent configuration if relevant. -->

**Notes (optional):**

<!-- Anything that would help a reviewer calibrate — e.g. "AI generated the tests, I wrote the feature" or "AI proposed the initial design, I rewrote half of it". -->
